posts.angle: payment rails are improving but card access still blocks teams
posts.copy: Cross-border payments are getting faster. New web payment methods are launching, but card access remains a bottleneck for global teams. RichXPay provides virtual cards funded with USDT and USDC.
sourceTitles: We’re adding 3 new ways to make web payments easier and more flexible.
Personalize your experience across Google based on your purchases, your way.
posts.landingSummary: Virtual card for global payments, USDT/USDC top-up, Apple Pay and subscription use cases.
